---
title: Lagrangian Analysis of the Northern Stratospheric Polar Vortex Split in April
  2020
pagetitle: 2021-8-1-Curbelo2021 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2021
author: Jezabel Curbelo, Gang Chen and Carlos Roberto Mechoso
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 48, doi:10.1029/2021GL093874.
recommended_citation: 'Jezabel Curbelo, Gang Chen and Carlos Roberto Mechoso, 2021:
  Lagrangian Analysis of the Northern Stratospheric Polar Vortex Split in April 2020,
  <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 48, doi:10.1029/2021GL093874.'
paper_url: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021GL093874
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Lagrangian Analysis of the Northern Stratospheric Polar Vortex Split in April 2020

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2021*

**Recommended citation:** Jezabel Curbelo, Gang Chen and Carlos Roberto Mechoso, 2021: Lagrangian Analysis of the Northern Stratospheric Polar Vortex Split in April 2020, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 48, doi:10.1029/2021GL093874.

[Download paper](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021GL093874){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
